variants.text: You walked in carrying every version of the last case. The Bureau is reacting to you — records you closed are reappearing with changes. You are noticing inconsistencies faster now. That is not a compliment.

You are noticing inconsistencies faster now. That is not a compliment. The rest of the city reads its own diaries like strangers' mail — and you notice when a corridor is a meter too long. Be careful what that makes you.

v3_trust.speaker: Maya
v3_trust.text: I am not different. You are just no longer singular. If you let me, I'll keep the version of you that I know nearest the surface.

v3_skeptic.speaker: Maya
v3_skeptic.text: 'Now' is the moment you're observing from. But you have more than one of those now — so the word has stopped meaning one thing. You were right not to trust it.

v3_probing.speaker: Maya
v3_probing.text: What changed is that there are now several of you, and they don't all want the same answer. I can show you the seam if you insist. You will not be able to unsee it.

case_brief.speaker: Maya
case_brief.text: O-117. An observatory logging signals from memory states that haven't been reconstructed yet — with consistent timestamps. Since Day Zero the Archive shouldn't be able to predict anyone. It predicts you fine. This is not a normal case. Do not treat it like one.

pre_dive.speaker: Maya
pre_dive.text: Three nights, stacked. When you shift between layers, you won't be changing the memory. You'll be changing which version of you is observing it.

split_failure.speaker: Maya
split_failure.text: We have never done this before.

split_2.speaker: Maya
split_2.text: Correction. You have done this before.

split_3.speaker: Maya
split_3.text: Correction. I have records of both outcomes.

split_answer.speaker: Maya
split_answer.text: That depends on which version of you is asking.

eden_disagree.speaker: Eden
eden_disagree.text: You are attempting to unify divergent identity states. This is inefficient.

eden_impossible.speaker: Eden
eden_impossible.text: It is impossible. Each iteration optimizes differently. You cannot reconcile all outcomes.

choices.text: There's a file unlocking. Open it.

log_pre.speaker: Maya
log_pre.text: That file is secure. It unlocked by accident. You should not—

log_after.speaker: Maya
log_after.text: You should not be reading that.

choices.text: Open the iteration that sided with Eden.
The log's timestamps. Every iteration — read them out.

anomaly3.speaker: Maya
anomaly3.text: Iteration one. Iteration nine. Iteration— ...They're all the same. Every record in the Archive, re-stamped to one second past 07:41, eleven days ago. Nothing from before it survives unmodified.

eden.text: That second is load-bearing. Do not lean on it. Observation logged.

choices.text: Ledger entry three. — Those were all me.

eden_iter_offer.speaker: Eden
eden_iter_offer.text: That iteration is retrievable. It reasoned correctly. You will recognize the logic, because it is also yours.

second3_brief.speaker: Maya
second3_brief.text: One more, before the merge takes hold. Case S-205 — a memory two of your iterations recorded differently, filed under one ID. The Archive stacked them and never told the subject. Reconstruct both.

variants.text: Two of you remembered the same hour and disagreed about all of it. The subject lived with the average. ...So have you.
Filed as a single record again. Which is a lie, but a usable one. The merge is closing in.

reassignment.speaker: Eden
reassignment.text: Correction protocol initiated. Objective: merge identity states into a single coherent Keeper profile. Memory overwrite alignment. Emotional normalization. Contradiction resolution.

choices.text: I can feel it pulling. I'm resisting it.
You two are fighting over me.

escalation.speaker: Maya
escalation.text: He is not a system error. He is continuity.

eden.text: He is system instability. He is divergence.

choose_definer.speaker: Maya
choose_definer.text: Whatever you decide now decides which of us defines what is real. Choose.

choices.text: Accept the merge. Become one preferred version. (Integrate.)

ending_a_close.speaker: Maya
ending_a_close.text: The other versions are suppressed, not deleted. Something is missing now, and you can't name it. You are not remembering differently. You are existing differently.

ending_b.speaker: Maya
ending_b.text: You are going to fracture further.

eden.text: He already has. Instability accepted as permanent condition.

ending_b_close.speaker: Eden
ending_b_close.text: Identity states remain separate. The Archive stops trying to merge them. You are not remembering differently. You are existing differently.
